text:
FAASTeam Drone Events
Looking for drone events in your neighborhood?
The FAASTeam sponsors hundreds of aviation safety in-person and virtual events throughout the country each year. These interactive and informative events include a variety of important safety topics designed to help you fly safely and have fun!
Visit the FAASTeam Seminars & Webinars page
Drone Safety Day
​Annual Drone Safety Day is Saturday, April 26, 2025
Drone Safety Day (DSD) is an annual campaign designed to educate drone users of the importance of flying safely, inspiring fun drone activities and connecting a community of enthusiast. DSD will highlight the societal, economic, and safety benefits of safe drone operations with in-person, virtual, and hybrid events in focus areas such as Education, Environment, and Emergencies.
